rulings.Case Title: FRANCIS FANELLI et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Exclude Plaintiffs' Supplemental Amended Responses To Standard Asbestos Case Interrogatories Or Reference To The Shangri-La Or In The Alternative To Reopen Plaintiffs' Deposition, Continue The Trial Date, And Stay Expert Depositions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, February 9, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. DEFENDANT SLOAN VALVE COMPANY's Motion To Exclude Plaintiffs' Supplemental Amended Responses To Standard Asbestos Case Interrogatories Or Reference To The Shangri-La Or In The Alternative To Reopen Plaintiffs' Deposition, Continue The Trial Date, And Stay Expert Depositions is continued to February 16, 2010 at 9:00 a.m in Department 220 at the parties' request in order to give them more time to informally resolve the issues raised by the motion. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: FRANCIS FANELLI et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Defendant Sloan Valve Companys Motion To Exclude Plaintiffs Supplemental-Amended Responses To Standard Asbestos Case Interrogatories Or Reference To The Shangri-La Or In The Alternative To Reopen Plaintiffs Deposition, Continue The Trial Date, And Stay Expert Depositions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, February 9, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. DEFENDANT BONDEX INTERNATIONAL, INC.'s Joinder In Defendant Sloan Valve Company's Motion To Exclude Plaintiff's Supplemental-Amended Responses To Standard Asbestos Case Interrogatories Or Reference To The Shangri-La Or In The Alternative To Reopen Plaintiffs Deposition, Continue The Trial Date, And Stay Expert Depositions is continued to February 16, 2010 at 9:00 a.m in Department 220 pursuant to the continuance of the underlying motion. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: SHARON SCRIVNER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Union Carbide Corporation To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Or, Alternatively, Motion Compelling Compliance
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, February 9, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE CORPORATION'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Or, Alternatively, Motion Compelling Compliance is taken off calendar per request of moving party. = (220/HEK)
